_meta.description: Analyst ratings and social sentiment data for US Bitcoin mining companies
_meta.note: Data sourced from web research: StockTwits, AltIndex, Danelfin, TipRanks, CoinCodex, and financial news outlets. Last researched 2026-02-26.

analyst_ratings.note: Positive on MARA's hash rate growth trajectory and BTC treasury strategy
Maintaining Buy despite Q3 miss on net income due to BTC fair value marks
Upgraded from Neutral; improved hash rate and BTC price outlook
Buy; Riot's Corsicana facility expansion is key catalyst; demand response is a competitive moat
Overweight; largest fully owned US mining campus provides strategic advantage
Downgraded from Buy; SEC subpoena adds uncertainty; regulatory risk elevated
Raising target; CleanSpark's rapid hash rate expansion and cost efficiency are impressive
Strong FY2024 results; one of the most efficient miners in the sector
AI pivot with CoreWeave deal significantly improves long-term revenue visibility
CoreWeave deal is transformational; upgrading target significantly
Large BTC treasury per share makes HUT an attractive Bitcoin proxy
Nuclear-powered mining gives WULF structural cost advantage; strong margin improvement
AI/HPC expansion adds second growth driver alongside mining
Attractive valuation; Texas expansion positions Cipher for growth
AI pivot accelerating; $160M facility secures growth runway
Post-halving margin pressure; international expansion is longer-term catalyst

75% Strong Buy, 25% Hold consensus. Deeply undervalued vs peers at 1.23x fwd EV/Sales vs RIOT 9.31x and MARA 7.62x. Cloud mining segment (68% revenue) provides revenue stability. Negative outlook on cloud hashing power decline to 25.5 EH/s from 31.0 EH/s.
AI Score 5/10 (Hold). 52% probability of outperforming market in next 3 months. Based on 23 fundamental, technical, and sentiment alpha signals.
Described as 'A Misunderstood Crypto Stock Poised For A Breakout'. Cloud mining powering growth with strategic Bitmain partnerships.

social_sentiment.notes: Dead last among peers for Reddit and StockTwits mentions per AltIndex. ~5 StockTwits posts/day. Retail unconvinced despite analyst Buy consensus. Fear & Greed Index at 39 (Fear). Positive newsflow on operations but muted/negative price reactions. Jan 2026: 229 BTC mined, 1,796 BTC held, 29.6 EH/s managed hashrate, 520 MW capacity.

StockTwits: 'extremely bullish' zone. 58% of shareholders adding positions, 26% holding. Down 21% YTD but retail stays bullish. Stock up 8% on Feb 25 bullish recovery. Rosenblatt top crypto pick alongside HUT. Price target cut by multiple firms amid BTC drop to $83K.

StockTwits: improved from 'bearish' to 'neutral' zone. 47% increasing holdings, 22% maintaining, 18% selling, 13% avoiding. Down 21%+ YTD. Completed $525M fundraise to buy Bitcoin. Feb mining output fell.
StockTwits: in 'bearish' territory with chatter dropping to 'extremely low'. Many investors view price drop as discount buying opportunity. Network difficulty easing is positive catalyst.

StockTwits: dropped from 'bullish' to 'bearish' zone, chatter from 'normal' to 'low'. 78.44% institutional ownership (highest among miners). AI/HPC pivot with CoreWeave deal driving institutional interest. +188 new institutional owners.
StockTwits: in 'bearish' territory. 124% return in 2025 but sentiment cooled in 2026. Rosenblatt top pick among crypto-linked stocks. Tariff policy blamed for risk asset volatility.
StockTwits: tepid but positive retail sentiment. 103% return in 2025. Major institutional ownership increase. AI/HPC pivot narrative strong. Bernstein bullish on BTC miners benefiting from AI boom.
StockTwits: 'neutral' territory. Down 20%+ YTD. 76.06% institutional ownership (2nd highest). Upbeat analyst coverage but retail traders remain unconvinced.

StockTwits: in spotlight as analysts weigh AI computing growth potential. AI hedge fund Situational Awareness reported stake. Shift from BTC mining to AI narrative driving interest. Among most frequently mentioned mining stocks Feb 2026.
71.36% institutional ownership. AI pivot accelerating. Mixed retail sentiment as stock caught between crypto weakness and AI optimism.

StockTwits: 'extremely bearish' territory with 'low' message volumes. Stock gained 58% in 2025 but sentiment reversed. Paraguay sale and AI pivot generating some positive coverage. Remained in 'bearish' zone.
StockTwits: was 'extremely bullish' with 'extremely high' volumes in mid-2025 after reaching 100K ETH reserves. Now in 8th percentile for StockTwits mentions. Down ~4% with broader crypto selloff.
StockTwits: in 'bearish' zone. Low social media presence relative to larger miners.
Minimal social media presence. Insufficient data volume for reliable sentiment scoring.
